pattern: Count letters that appear in both cases by collecting lowercase and uppercase sets and intersecting them.
hints: Build the set of distinct lowercase letters and the set of distinct uppercase letters present in the string.
A letter qualifies when its lowercase form is in the lowercase set AND its uppercase form is in the uppercase set.
Iterate over all 26 possible letters and count how many satisfy both conditions.

edge_inputs.description: uppercase present but no matching lowercase
same letter repeated many times in both cases

stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    import string
    chars = string.ascii_letters
    w = ''.join(rng.choice(list(chars)) for _ in range(size))
    return [w]
